Created attachment 147187
Add PyCharm

The intelligent Python IDE with unique code assistance and analysis, for
productive Python development on all levels. Key features:

- Django integration
- Support for various source control systems
- Virtualenv and Vagrant support

WWW: http://jetbrains.com/pycharm
